description_for_human: Automate your Substack — publish newsletters, post notes, comment on posts, and manage your content programmatically.
description_for_model: This plugin provides tools to automate Substack operations. Use it to publish newsletter posts (with title, subtitle, and markdown body), post short notes, comment on Substack posts, auto-scan target accounts for relevant posts and comment on them, and list recent newsletters, notes, and comment history from the connected Substack account.
